Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
5 
 AGE_GRP_CD 
LABEL: 
Age Group 
DESCRIPTION: A beneficiary’s age group (in years) during the last month of enrollment in the calendar year, grouped 
into categories. 
SHORT NAME: AGE_GRP_CD 
LONG NAME: AGE_GRP_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
FILE(S): 
Annual DE base 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 
VALUES: 
1 = Age <1 
2 = Age 1–5 
3 = Age
